case_number: civil dispute between the parties. No one

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-4240 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________________ PRIORITY CASE: 1. For order on office objection. 2. For hearing of CMA No.19527/2023. 3. For hearing of main case. ----------- Dated; 22nd September 2023 Mr. Liaquat Ali Awan, Advocate alongwith Petitioner. Mr. Abdul Jalile Zubedi, Asst. A.G. Sindh. -*-*-*-*-*- Pursuant to Court’s directions, Mr. Mahzoor Ali, SSP West, DSP Manghopir Waheed Baloch, Inspector Tahir Hussain Shah Complaint Incharge of SSP West Office, SHO PS Manghopir SIP Noor Ahmed and SIP Amjad Ali from PS Orangi Town have shown appearance, filed comments/reply alongwith annexures, which are taken on record, copies of which has been supplied to the learned counsel for petitioner. SSP West submits that he has recently joined the SSP West office, however, submits that no harassment whatsoever has been caused to the petitioner, who was summoned pursuant to some complaint filed by respondent No.11, to submit his viewpoint. It is, however, submitted that petitioner will not be harassed, and in case of any dispute between the private parties, they will be at liberty to approach the relevant forum/Court of Law, as may be available under the law, whereas, police will not interfere in case of civil dispute between the parties. No one has shown appearance on behalf of the respondents No.11 and 12 inspite of Court’s Notice. However, in view of such statement by the SSP West, who has assured that no harassment whatsoever will be caused to the petitioner, petitioner and his counsel are satisfied and do not press instant petition, which is accordingly disposed of alongwith listed application.

No one has shown appearance on behalf of the respondents No.11 and 12 inspite of Court’s Notice. However, in view of such statement by the SSP West, who has assured that no harassment whatsoever will be caused to the petitioner, petitioner and his counsel are satisfied and do not press instant petition, which is accordingly disposed of alongwith listed application. J U D G E J U D G E *Farhan/PS*
